sizing_rule.note: Two-stage sizing: Fixed 100 contracts until equity crosses $404.24 threshold; switches to geometric/optimal-f mode above threshold; reverts to fixed contracts if equity falls below threshold again. Actual optimal_f percentage not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Trade a constant number of contracts until account equity reaches a geometric threshold, then switch to geometric position sizing; if equity drops below threshold after crossing it, revert to constant contracts until threshold is crossed again.
